description: Mexican Spanish (Central Mexico / CDMX standard) language pack for adult real-world learning. Meets the §10.1 MVP Seed Pack Target in full: 300 vocabulary, 75 core phrases, 25 grammar points, 25 dialogues, 20+ slang/register items, 20 pronunciation drills, 10 listening exercises, 10 writing prompts, 10 assessments, 5 roleplay scenarios.
coverage: A1-A2 everyday + adult real-world speech: courtesy through profanity (severity 1-7, with recognize-only/avoid guidance), the tú/usted register system (usted carries more everyday weight in Mexico than in Spain), the ustedes-only plural (no vosotros — a defining Latin American trait), Mexican spoken reality (ubiquitous diminutives, 'ahorita', 'mande', preterite-over-present-perfect for the recent past), and pronunciation grounded in the es-MX accent that Azure's pronunciation assessment actually models — seseo (no distinción), yeísmo, [x] for j/g, clear unaspirated s, pure five-vowel system. Grammar covers the A1-A2 core: ser vs estar, gender and articles, present-tense -ar/-er/-ir plus the load-bearing irregulars, gustar-type verbs, negation, questions, adjective agreement, possessives, direct/indirect object pronouns, reflexives, the preterite and an imperfect introduction, ir a + infinitive, por vs para, saber vs conocer, comparatives, and demonstratives.
editorialNotes: Deliberately Mexican, not pan-Hispanic: ustedes for all plural (never vosotros), seseo pronunciation, and Mexican vocabulary/slang throughout — chosen because es-MX is the neutral Latin American default and the dialect Azure's pronunciation assessment models cleanly (see the Spanish-dialect scope note). Iberian distinción (c/z as [θ]), vosotros, and Peninsular vocabulary are out of scope for this pack version, as are Rioplatense/Caribbean/Andean features. Identity-based slurs were deliberately EXCLUDED from the profanity set pending explicit owner review of framing — same policy as pt-br and fr. The chingar/madre family of Mexican profanity is included with severity and recognize-only/avoid guidance. See NATIVE_REVIEW.md.
